name: Desert Wind
description: Baruuk channels the desert wind to turn his fists and feet into an exalted weapon.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Increased the base Status Chance of Exalted Blade and Desert Wind to 15%, while also changing the Chromatic Blade and Reactive Storm Augments to stack in the same manner other Status Mods do. This was missed in the Status changes but is a necessary change now. The following reflects the new Maximums:

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Hotfix 26.1.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when using Baruuk’s Desert Wind's Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing sounds for Baruuk’s Desert Wind.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Baruuk's Desert Wind slam attack not working. Slam attack now always pushes enemies away (would previously pull if you were parrying).

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Update 24.4.0
patchlogs.changes: Melee combo damage multiplier now affects Baruuk Desert Wind waves.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.changes:
Fixed Baruuk’s Desert Wind weapon displaying as having Impact, Puncture, and Slash in the Arsenal when it's just Impact.
Fixed Baruuk’s Serene Storm Desert Wind waves not hitting ragdolled enemies.
Fixed Baruuk’s Serene Storm Desert Wind waves not matching FX direction.
